NoBlindfoldRemove: You don't have a blindfold to remove.
CantRemoveInLastStand: You cannot remove a blindfold while in last stand.
CantRemoveHandcuffed: You cannot remove a blindfold while handcuffed.
CantApplyInLastStand: You cannot apply a blindfold while in last stand.
CantApplyHandcuffed: You cannot apply a blindfold while handcuffed.
AdminForceBlindfold: Force a player to put on a blindfold
AdminRemoveBlindfold: Force a player to remove their blindfold
AdminRemoveBlindfoldHelp: Player ID to remove blindfold from
AdminCheckBlindfoldState: Check if a player is blindfolded
AdminCheckBlindfoldStateHelp: Player ID to check blindfold status
